## Intel stock upgraded from Strong Sell to Sell Candidate after Wednesday session

Very low signal; INTC remains in sell-rated territory on this technical framework — not actionable on fundamentals.

- StockInvest.us modestly upgraded INTC's technical rating — from Strong Sell Candidate to Sell Candidate
- Intel remains in bearish technical territory despite the incremental improvement
